mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3C1D-R2 — Retain Captured Web Portable Diagnostic

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast
import hashlib
import json

root = Path("Z:/FOXAI")
drop = root / "AGENT_FOX_V1A3C1D_R2"
installed = root / "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore"

checks = [
    (
        drop / "web_portable_closure_failure_diagnostic_v1r2.py",
        installed / "web_portable_closure_failure_diagnostic_v1r2.py",
        "1ab2d93273298804e4476a0d2c9f18375fb46c76d602f31be78a2828a0f4e01d",
    ),
    (
        drop / "V1A3C1_FAILURE_DIAGNOSTIC_CONTRACT_V1R2.json",
        installed / "V1A3C1_FAILURE_DIAGNOSTIC_CONTRACT_V1R2.json",
        "9d0a8c7bf4219cbbcaa65053271aae869a533d924218a88c53f2cb9fc78b8847",
    ),
    (
        drop / "README_V1A3C1D_R2.md",
        installed / "README_V1A3C1D_R2.md",
        "03def1546149b969422a760f1905be904733808447e9f89db24a4ffe11332f07",
    ),
]

for source, target, expected_hash in checks:
    assert source.is_file(), source
    assert target.is_file(), target
    assert hashlib.sha256(source.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected_hash
    assert hashlib.sha256(target.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected_hash

script_text = (installed / "web_portable_closure_failure_diagnostic_v1r2.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(script_text, str(installed / "web_portable_closure_failure_diagnostic_v1r2.py"), "exec")
tree = ast.parse(script_text)

imports = set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node, ast.Import):
        imports.update(alias.name.split(".")[0] for alias in node.names)
    elif isinstance(node, ast.ImportFrom) and node.module:
        imports.add(node.module.split(".")[0])

forbidden = {
    "subprocess", "socket", "urllib", "http", "ftplib", "requests",
    "pip", "ensurepip", "psutil", "winreg", "ctypes", "webbrowser",
    "importlib",
}
assert not (imports & forbidden), sorted(imports & forbidden)

contract = json.loads(
    (installed / "V1A3C1_FAILURE_DIAGNOSTIC_CONTRACT_V1R2.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
)
assert contract["mission_id"] == "ENG-20260721-215227-E95BEF"
assert contract["subject_mission_id"] == "ENG-20260721-172935-37F095"
assert contract["protected_direct_context_count"] == 1
assert contract["correction"]["diagnostic_capture_logic_changed"] is False
assert contract["correction"]["expected_windows_paths_use_forward_slashes"] is True

scope = contract["scope"]
assert scope["normal_closure_outputs_generated"] is False
assert scope["diagnostic_returns_success_after_capture"] is True
assert scope["maximum_reads_per_reached_source"] == 1
assert scope["source_buffer_ceiling_bytes"] == 8388608
assert scope["diagnostic_output_ceiling_bytes"] == 1048576
assert scope["payload_interpreter_child_processes"] == 0
assert scope["payload_shell_child_processes"] == 0

print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3C1D_R2_INSTALL_PREFLIGHT_OK")
